name: 110W/165W/220W Linear High Bay Light CCT 4000K/5000K AC 120-277V
description: Illuminate your commercial and industrial environments with our 2ft LED Linear High Bay Light, available in 110W, 165W, and 220W power options. Featuring selectable color temperatures of 4000K and 5000K, this high-performance fixture is designed to deliver bright, uniform, and energy-efficient lighting for a wide range of high-ceiling applications. Why Choose This LED Linear High Bay Light? With its combination of power flexibility, color temperature customization, and durable construction, this fixture adapts to your space’s unique requirements—making it the smart choice for any facility seeking reliable, energy-efficient lighting.
short_desc: Key Features: Multiple Power Options: Choose from 110W, 165W, or 220W models to match your lighting needs and energy goals. Selectable Color Temperature: Easily switch between 4000K (neutral white) and 5000K (daylight white) for the ideal ambiance and visibility in your space. High Efficiency: Engineered for maximum lumen output with reduced energy consumption—lowering operational costs without compromising brightness. Rugged Durability: Constructed with robust materials to withstand harsh commercial and industrial environments. Quick & Easy Installation: Designed for simple setup in high bay areas, minimizing installation time and labor costs. Broad Application: Provides consistent, glare-free lighting across large spaces, improving safety, comfort, and productivity. Perfect For: Workshops & Garages: Delivers precise lighting for task-focused activities and craftsmanship. Warehouses: Enhances visibility across aisles and shelving for improved safety and efficiency. Retail Spaces: Creates a bright, inviting environment that enhances product presentation and customer experience. Manufacturing Areas: Supports production with reliable, high-output lighting tailored for industrial demands. Commercial Facilities: Ideal for gyms, sports arenas, event halls, and other high-ceiling venues.
